task:
Open /home/user/Documents/report_data.xlsx in LibreOffice Calc. The 'Data' sheet has columns Month (A), Revenue (B), Expenses (C); row 1 has headers and rows 2-7 contain data for January through June.

Reshape the sheet so that:
- Row 1 is a single merged cell across A1:C1 containing the bold title 'Financial Report H1 2025'.
- Row 2 holds the headers: A2='Month', B2='Revenue', C2='Expenses', plus D2='Profit' (re-enter the original headers if the merge replaced them).
- Rows 3-8 hold the original 6 months of data (Jan-Jun).
- D3:D8 = `=B3-C3` (Revenue - Expenses) for each month.
- A9 = 'TOTAL' (bold).
- B9 = `=SUM(B3:B8)`, C9 = `=SUM(C3:C8)`, D9 = `=SUM(D3:D8)`.

Save the file.

verification.eval: 'Financial Report H1 2025' in str(result.get('display','')) or 'Financial Report H1 2025' in str(result.get('value',''))
any('TOTAL' in str(row) for row in result.get('data',[]) if row)
any(337000 == val or 337000.0 == val for row in result.get('data',[]) if row for val in row if isinstance(val,(int,float)))
verification.description: Total revenue = 337000 appears in the sheet

verification.eval: any(271000 == val or 271000.0 == val for row in result.get('data',[]) if row for val in row if isinstance(val,(int,float)))
verification.description: Total expenses = 271000 appears in the sheet

verification.eval: any(66000 == val or 66000.0 == val for row in result.get('data',[]) if row for val in row if isinstance(val,(int,float)))
verification.description: Total profit = 66000 appears in the sheet
